CaseInputRequest.description: Operator input captured immutably at case creation.

ConfigPreviewRequest.description: Raw config stays request-local and is never recorded in an event.

CreateCaseRequest.description: Client-supplied case intent; identity/scope remain server-derived.

ErrorBody.description: Stable error envelope returned by every API failure.

ResolveCaseRequest.description: Evidence-bearing explicit resolution action for a confirmed case.
ResolveCaseRequest.title: ResolveCaseRequest

OIDC access token.description: A signed OIDC access token issued for the NetOps API audience.

get.description:
Return verified identity after opening its RLS-scoped transaction.

The connection itself is not exposed to clients. Injecting it here ensures
the first signed-in API boundary already exercises the same tenant context
used by future organization-owned repositories.
List a filtered, cursor-paginated case queue visible to the signed scope.

401.description: A signed access token is required.

403.description: The signed user lacks case permission.

get.description:
Return a bounded ordered event replay; reconnect using the final SSE ID.

The response intentionally ends after the persisted replay page rather than
holding a database transaction open. Clients reconnect with ``Last-Event-ID``
to recover pages and receive later commits, which remains correct across API
restarts and outbox-worker crashes.

401.description: A signed access token is required.
